MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-09-2009 VACATED. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED ON 11/3/09. (218)

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DARRELL DION'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED. THE STIPULATION SHALL BE ENTERED AS A JUDGMENT, AND PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE $1,176.33 SECURITY DEPOSIT, LESS $50.00 FOR CLEANING AFTER DEFENDANT VACATED, PLUS $1,732.50 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR A TOTAL OF $2,858.83. THE SETTLEMENT WAIVED THE BACK RENT THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO CHARGE DEFENDANT, AND PLAINTIFF RELEASED HIS CLAIMS EXISTING AS OF THAT TIME CONCERNING THE CONDITION OF THE APARTMENT, REQUIRING ONLY THAT DEFENDANT VACATE AND LEAVE IT BROOM-CLEAN, AS OPPOSED TO REPARING EXISTING DAMAGE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

DISCOVERY 612, MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY - HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT DARREL DION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INITIAL RESPONSES WERE MADE WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,375, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HILARY K. HEDEMARK OF THE STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 956-6488 X 21 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KRISTEN ROSS OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, TEL. NO. 835-6777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DARRELL DION'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Request For Attorneys' Fees IS GRANTED. THE STIPULATION SHALL BE ENTERED AS A JUDGMENT, AND PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE $1,176.33 SECURITY DEPOSIT, LESS $50.00 FOR CLEANING AFTER DEFENDANT VACATED, PLUS $1,732.50 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR A TOTAL OF $2,858.83. THE SETTLEMENT WAIVED THE BACK RENT THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO CHARGE DEFENDANT, AND PLAINTIFF RELEASED HIS CLAIMS EXISTING AS OF THAT TIME CONCERNING THE CONDITION OF THE APARTMENT, REQUIRING ONLY THAT DEFENDANT VACATE AND LEAVE IT BROOM-CLEAN, AS OPPOSED TO REPARING EXISTING DAMAGE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kristen Ross, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Darrel Dion
Hilary K. Hedemark, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: James Quinn

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Darrel Dion's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Plaintiff is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the initial responses were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,375, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
